content: Crear services/mlb_pressure_base.py con calculate_team_pressure_base + calculate_match_pressure_context (umbrales del usuario)
Phase 9: cablear compute_all_advanced_adjustments en mlb_day_orchestrator con ponderación 60/35/0 según data_quality y guardar raw+weighted en metadata
Cablear pressure_base en orchestrator (Under fragility upgrade cuando HIGH_PRESSURE, etc.)
Phase 10: añadir detector statcast-contact en mlb_explosive_inning_engine.py (fail-soft, capped, nuevos reason codes)
Crear tests pytest: test_mlb_pressure_base.py + test_mlb_advanced_stats_wiring.py + test_explosive_statcast.py
Correr pytest suite completa (target >550 PASS) + lint Python
